title: 2" Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Angled Paint Brush
features: This Seriously Good angled paint brush has been designed to give you controlled paint application along edges and into corners
This brush will give you seriously good results when painting walls and ceilings Use with emulsion paint

A great brush solution for cutting in around the top of a wall near the ceiling around light fixtures and for painting other hard to reach areas For best results rinse brush head before use to remove any dust
The patented No-Loss* technology means no bristle loss when you are painting

After use with emulsion paint remove the excess paint and wash in warm soapy water or rinse in clean running water or cleaning fluids Then immediately dry thoroughly *Bristle loss may occur if left to soak or if left in a damp area
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! 2" Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Angled Paint Brush Contents 1 x 2" paint brush For controlled paint application along edges and corners This angled paint brush gives you controlled paint application along edges and into corners when painting walls and ceilings with emulsion paint. Plus, our patented no-loss technology means no bristle loss whilst painting. For best results rinse brush head before use. After use, clean the brush according to the paint manufacturer's instructions. Doing a Painting Project Team this brush with the Seriously Good 4" Walls & Ceilings Roller set and the Seriously Good 9" Walls & Ceilings Roller set. Compliments all other brushes in the Seriously Good range. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range.
